qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_factor_eval as ID, t.c_factor as CODE, t.d_factor as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Evaluaciones.FACTORES_EVAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_factor_eval LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_factor_eval={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} AND t.oi_evaluacion ={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evaluacion} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_factor_eval as ID, t.c_factor as CODE, t.d_factor as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Evaluaciones.FACTORES_EVAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_factor_eval LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_factor={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND t.oi_evaluacion ={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evaluacion} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_factor_eval as ID, t.c_factor as CODE, t.d_factor as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM CYD12_FACTORES_EVAL as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Evaluaciones.FACTORES_EVAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_factor_eval LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_evaluacion ={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_evaluacion} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW
